attributes.action: New motability milage is not enough for most pip users.
attributes.additional_details: The limitations on mileage are already causing some issues the reduction is going to make the scheme enviable for most pip users. This makes the labour government look cheap restricting those of us who already struggle with day to day life.
attributes.background: New motability milage is not enough for most pip users. It needs to be increased back to 20000 per annum to be viable for people or you risk limiting their ability to live. I myself and my partner are both smdisabled with children. For basic family life usage 10000 is nowhere near enough

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign these petitions which call for a similar action: 

Stop proposed changes to the Motability Scheme
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752400

Motability to maintain higher mileage options for disabled people
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765906
